businessSummary.oneLiner: Government and enterprise AI data analytics platform — transforming from US defense/intelligence core partner to commercial AI powerhouse
businessSummary.description: Palantir builds software platforms that analyze and integrate complex data. Since AIP (AI Platform) launch, the commercial segment has seen explosive growth. Q4 2025 revenue $1.407B (+70% YoY), US commercial revenue $507M (+137% YoY). Mar 2 price $145.26, down 30% from 52-week high of $207.52. 2026 and 2027 consensus EPS being revised sharply higher. P/E 229.41x, Forward P/E 78.45x.
howTheyMakeMoney: Government contracts: US DoD, CIA, NSA and other national security agency software licenses and maintenance
Commercial segment: AIP-based enterprise AI analytics platform subscriptions — US commercial revenue +137% YoY
International government: NATO allies and Five Eyes partner government contracts
keyProducts: AIP (AI Platform): Connects LLMs to enterprise data for AI analytics
Gotham: Government/defense data analysis and decision support
Foundry: Enterprise data integration and analytics platform
Apollo: Software deployment and management automation
Maven: US DoD AI operational support system

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Elevated but reflects rapid EPS growth (+232% YoY). Converging toward Forward P/E 78.45x

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026 EPS $1.85. High but PEG 1.49 given 52.72% growth rate

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth
keyMetrics.interpretation: Q4 +70% YoY. US commercial +137% driving acceleration

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Best-in-class among SaaS companies. High operating leverage

keyMetrics.name: Gross Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Extremely high margins characteristic of software business

keyMetrics.name: PEG
keyMetrics.interpretation: Within fair valuation range given growth rate

growthDrivers.title: 2026 & 2027 EPS Consensus Sharply Revised Higher — Motley Fool
growthDrivers.description: Consensus EPS for 2026 and 2027 significantly revised upward over the past month. US commercial +137% growth is the core driver.

growthDrivers.title: AIP Commercial Adoption Accelerating — US Commercial Revenue $507M (+137% YoY)
growthDrivers.description: AIP bootcamp-driven enterprise customer conversion accelerating. Q4 US commercial revenue $507M represents 137% YoY growth.

growthDrivers.title: Early March Share Price Rebound — AI Demand and Government Contract Expectations
growthDrivers.description: Strong rebound in early March (+11.16% weekly) after 38% post-earnings correction. Analyst upgrades and accelerating AI demand driving recovery.

growthDrivers.title: Government AI Budget Expansion — DOGE Efficiency and Defense AI Investment
growthDrivers.description: Expanding US defense AI budgets and DOGE government efficiency projects broaden Palantir's revenue opportunities.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: Government security clearances (Top Secret/SCI), 20-year defense/intelligence relationships, and AIP enterprise AI platform expansion are core moats.

moats.description: Top Secret/SCI clearance. Extremely high barrier to competitor entry.
Gotham/Foundry deeply integrated into customer data infrastructure. Very high replacement costs.
AIP bootcamps rapidly expanding enterprise customer base. More usage → better models.

competitors.name: Snowflake
competitors.detail: Data cloud platform. Enterprise data analytics competition

competitors.name: Microsoft (Azure AI)
competitors.detail: Azure AI services targeting government and enterprise markets

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI platform. Much smaller scale than PLTR

recentNews.significance: Strong rebound from 38% post-earnings correction. Analyst upgrades and accelerating AI demand driving recovery.

recentNews.significance: Consensus EPS significantly revised upward over past month. Fundamental backing for 2,000% gain since Jan 2023.

recentNews.significance: Business momentum remains solid despite 38% pullback from 52-week high. Valuation normalization debate.

recentNews.significance: Strong technical rebound. $145.26 back above 200-day MA.

recentNews.significance: Technical rebound signals confirmed vs. actual Mar 2 open.

analystOpinions.notableComment: 12 of 19 analysts Buy. Consensus $185.82 (+27.9%). Still at a discount to 52-week high of $207.52. AIP commercial growth of 137% is the core bull case.

risks.title: P/E 229x — Extreme Overvaluation
risks.description: Even Forward P/E 78.45x is extremely expensive vs. market. Sharp multiple compression risk if growth decelerates.

risks.title: Down 30% From 52-Week High — Trend Reversal Unconfirmed
risks.description: $207.52 to $145 decline. Technically, the downtrend has not been fully reversed.

risks.title: Government Budget Dependency — Political Risk
risks.description: US defense budget cuts or administration change could impact core revenue stream.

risks.title: Continued Insider Selling (-1.12%)
risks.description: Ongoing executive share sales sending negative market signals.

risks.title: Competition Intensifying — Microsoft, Snowflake, Databricks
risks.description: Large cloud/data companies aggressively entering AI analytics market. Long-term competitive pressure.

buyReasons.title: EPS Consensus Sharply Revised Higher — Fundamental Improvement Confirmed
buyReasons.rationale: 2026 and 2027 EPS significantly revised upward over past month. Earnings momentum accelerating.

buyReasons.title: US Commercial Revenue +137% — AIP Platform Effect
buyReasons.rationale: AIP bootcamp conversion rates high. Commercial revenue diversifying away from government dependency.

buyReasons.title: Down 30% From 52-Week High — Valuation Normalization Underway
buyReasons.rationale: $207 to $145 decline brings Forward P/E to 78x. Potential buying opportunity for high-growth stock.

buyReasons.title: Government AI Budget Expansion + DOGE Efficiency Beneficiary
buyReasons.rationale: Rising defense AI investment and government efficiency projects align with Palantir's core strengths.

overallOpinion: Mar 2 close $145.26 (+5.87%). Strong rebound (+11.16% weekly) from 30% correction off 52-week high. 2026/2027 EPS consensus sharply revised higher fueling recovery.
12 of 19 analysts Buy. Consensus $185.82 (+27.9%). AIP commercial revenue +137% driving growth acceleration. P/E 229x is a burden but converging to Forward P/E 78x.
$145.26, above 200-day MA $137, below 50-day $160. RSI 51 neutral. Reclaiming 50-day MA at $160 is the key short-term pivot.
